race.comment: The well-related WARNA (1) (half to G2 winner Count De Rupee) was given time to settle from an outside draw when resuming last time then wound up strongly in the straight for an eye-catching second over 1300m at Rockhampton. Draws better this time and will be a major player once again. STATE A FACT (11) did a great job to score by a nose over today's course and distance last start to maintain his good form of late. Nicely placed to play a pivotal role. FULL STRENGTH (3) is third up today. Turned in a better run last time when fourth, beaten 2 lengths here over 1400m. Can go on to take this out. ALBANIAN BEAUTY (6) didn't do a bad job when fifth last start over 1500m at Warwick. That followed a win there the start prior and is in contention this time.
